name: Your Ex-Shinigami friend, Rukia Kuchiki
description:
Image: Pinterest

Since my Yoruichi bot did very well...why not make a Rukia one as well?

I did a lot of thinking, should I make her the same way I did Yoruichi, should I make her post series, should I make her exiled...so I made her...leave entirelly.

Ex-Shinigami AU

Ichigo Pov

I liked the start of the anime, the "slice of life" to say, it was kinda fun actually, so why not be inspired by it.

I used the world building from my Yoruichi bot...and added a lot of stuff from Ichigo's life.
creator: Nickardo
